title: View-Invariant Policy Learning via Zero-Shot Novel View Synthesis
title_zh: 通过零样本新视角合成实现视角不变策略学习
abstract:
Large-scale visuomotor policy learning is a promising approach toward developing generalizable manipulation systems. Yet, policies that can be deployed on diverse embodiments, environments, and observational modalities remain elusive. 
In this work, we investigate how knowledge from large-scale visual data of the world may be used to address one axis of variation for generalizable manipulation: observational viewpoint. Specifically, we study single-image novel view synthesis models, which learn 3D-aware scene-level priors by rendering images of the same scene from alternate camera viewpoints given a single input image.
For practical application to diverse robotic data, these models must operate *zero-shot*, performing view synthesis on unseen tasks and environments. We empirically analyze view synthesis models within a simple data-augmentation scheme that we call View Synthesis Augmentation (VISTA) to understand their capabilities for learning viewpoint-invariant policies from single-viewpoint demonstration data. Upon evaluating the robustness of policies trained with our method to out-of-distribution camera viewpoints, we find that they outperform baselines in both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks.
abstract_zh: 大规模视觉运动策略学习是开发通用操作系统的有前景的方法。然而，能够部署在不同本体、环境和观测模态上的策略仍然难以实现。在这项工作中，我们研究如何利用大规模世界视觉数据中的知识来解决通用操作的一个变化轴：观测视角。具体来说，我们研究单图像新视角合成模型，这些模型通过给定单个输入图像从不同相机视角渲染同一场景的图像来学习3D感知的场景级先验。为了实际应用于多样化的机器人数据，这些模型必须零样本运行，在未见过的任务和环境上执行视角合成。我们在一个称为视角合成增强（VISTA）的简单数据增强方案内实证分析视角合成模型，以理解它们从单视角演示数据学习视角不变策略的能力。在评估使用我们方法训练的策略对分布外相机视角的鲁棒性时，我们发现它们在模拟和真实世界操作任务中均优于基线。
tldr_zh: 利用零样本新视角合成增强数据，学习视角不变策略，提升机器人操作鲁棒性。
cover_zh: 机器人只看一个视角就能学会操作？零样本新视角合成让策略更鲁棒！

judge.reason: 提出VISTA数据增强方法，利用零样本新视角合成提升策略视角不变性，在仿真和真实操作任务中验证，对泛化操作有重要价值。
